title: Artoo Zeefor
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Artoo Zeefor''' was an [[Astromech droid/Legends|astromech droid]] that was part of the crew of the [[YT-1300 light freighter/Legends|YT-1300 light freighter]] ''[[Night Havok]]''.

==Sources==
*<!-- 1992-06-XX -->''[[Planets of the Galaxy, Volume Two]]''
